# Tables

<!--
Auto-generated by the BET results task. Edit this file in the report repository to choose, remove, reorder, or rewrite tables.
The reviewed table files and this section are committed with the report so every writing job renders the same source material.
-->

## Fishery names

<!-- table: fishery-names -->
```{r}
#| label: tbl-fishery-names
#| tbl-cap: "Fishery definitions used by, including fishery number, descriptive fishery name, region, selectivity group, and tag recapture group assignment where available."
#| echo: false
#| warning: false
#| message: false
table_file <- "generated/outputs/tables/fishery-names.csv"
if (file.exists(table_file)) {
  table_data <- utils::read.csv(table_file, check.names = FALSE)
  knitr::kable(table_data)
} else {
  knitr::asis_output(paste0("Missing table file: `", table_file, "`"))
}
```

## Tag reporting groups

<!-- table: tag-reporting-groups -->
```{r}
#| label: tbl-tag-reporting-groups
#| tbl-cap: "Tag reporting group labels used by. These labels document the reporting-rate groups used to interpret tag recapture and reporting-rate diagnostics."
#| echo: false
#| warning: false
#| message: false
table_file <- "generated/outputs/tables/tag-reporting-groups.csv"
if (file.exists(table_file)) {
  table_data <- utils::read.csv(table_file, check.names = FALSE)
  knitr::kable(table_data)
} else {
  knitr::asis_output(paste0("Missing table file: `", table_file, "`"))
}
```

## Parameter bound hit summary

<!-- table: parameter-bound-hit-summary -->
```{r}
#| label: tbl-parameter-bound-hit-summary
#| tbl-cap: "Summary of estimated parameters at their lower or upper bounds. Counts are reported by model, with separate totals for lower-bound hits, upper-bound hits, and movement-related parameters."
#| echo: false
#| warning: false
#| message: false
table_file <- "generated/outputs/tables/parameter-bound-hit-summary.csv"
if (file.exists(table_file)) {
  table_data <- utils::read.csv(table_file, check.names = FALSE)
  knitr::kable(table_data)
} else {
  knitr::asis_output(paste0("Missing table file: `", table_file, "`"))
}
```

## Parameter bound hit detail

<!-- table: parameter-bound-hit-detail -->
```{r}
#| label: tbl-parameter-bound-hit-detail
#| tbl-cap: "Detailed list of estimated parameters that hit their lower or upper bounds. The table includes parameter names, estimates, bound values, and movement or selectivity context where it can be inferred."
#| echo: false
#| warning: false
#| message: false
table_file <- "generated/outputs/tables/parameter-bound-hit-detail.csv"
if (file.exists(table_file)) {
  table_data <- utils::read.csv(table_file, check.names = FALSE)
  knitr::kable(table_data)
} else {
  knitr::asis_output(paste0("Missing table file: `", table_file, "`"))
}
```
